# NIP-78 Reference Card

NIP-78 enables custom app data storage on Nostr relays. Kind: 30078, required tag: d (app name/context), optional tags: content and others. Filter pattern: kind:30078, d:* . JSON example: {"kind": 30078, "tags": ["d.appname"], "content": "app specific data"}.

---
